mapper.select: SELECT id, agency_id, signup_type, name, phone, email, password, agree_terms, agree_privacy, agree_location, agree_marketing, invite_code_used, member_role, is_active, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_members WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_members SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, agency_id, signup_type, name, phone, email, password, agree_terms, agree_privacy, agree_location, agree_marketing, invite_code_used, member_role, is_active, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_members WHERE id = #{id}
